name: Xvape Aria+
summary: A conduction vaporiser for herb and concentrate with a large battery, for patients wanting long sessions in one device.
description: The Xvape Aria+ is a compact conduction device with a full ceramic oven and ceramic mouthpiece, ready in about 15 to 20 seconds. It handles both dry herb and concentrates, with a wide 100 to 240C range on an OLED display showing temperature, battery and session status. The 2600mAh battery supports extended use with USB-C pass-through charging, and a built-in stir tool helps even out extraction. Haptic alerts and two session lengths round it off. A versatile, well-equipped option for patients who want a long-running dual-use device.
